features.name: split_var attribute with read-write multi-bit variable
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit logic variable with the /* verilator split_var */ attribute that is used in both LHS and RHS contexts (read-write pattern)

features.name: bit_select access on split_var variable
features.description: Code should include individual bit-selects (v[0], v[1], v[2]) on a variable marked with split_var attribute

features.name: arithmetic operation on split_var variable RHS
features.description: Code should include a split_var variable used in an arithmetic addition expression on the RHS
